selections.name: Kissavos
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter with a good draw. Has placed on soft going and looks ready to break through.

selections.name: Sunstaz
selections.reason: Solid form in recent starts. Has experience on heavy ground which is a plus today.

selections.name: Sweet Marlene
selections.reason: Has placed on heavy tracks previously. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the ability.

selections.name: Nulkaba Star
selections.reason: Drawn well on the inside. Has placed multiple times on soft ground.

danger_horse.name: Sunstaz
danger_horse.reason: Main threat given consistent recent form and heavy track exposure.

selections.name: Koritsi
selections.reason: Excellent second last start. Ready to peak and handles the conditions well.

selections.name: Wootton Please
selections.reason: Third last start and draws perfectly on the inside. Fitter now and will be prominent.

selections.name: Dellucy
selections.reason: Good second last start but has to overcome a wide draw. Has heavy track experience.

selections.name: Frogmore
selections.reason: Inside draw is a big advantage on this tight turning track. Can improve.

danger_horse.name: Wootton Please
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to get a perfect run and has shown enough ability to win this.

selections.name: Torpedo Tube
selections.reason: Strong third two starts back. Looks a strong winning hope in an open race.

selections.name: Bonjour Bill
selections.reason: Inside draw helps. Has some heavy track exposure and can improve third-up.

selections.name: Saturn Rising
selections.reason: Fair debut effort. Drawn well and should take benefit from the first-up run.

selections.name: Prince Of Wants
selections.reason: Will kick on with that debut run under the belt. Good draw.

danger_horse.name: Bonjour Bill
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to get every chance and has the fitness edge now.

selections.name: Master Of War
selections.reason: Consistent form and gets the inside barrier. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Farraige (NZ)
selections.reason: Exceptional heavy track record (8:0-1-5). Will relish the conditions today.

selections.name: On Any Tuesday
selections.reason: Good recent form including a win three starts back. Can feature.

selections.name: Spacetime Legend
selections.reason: Strong second last start. Has heavy track experience and will be attacking the line.

danger_horse.name: Farraige (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: The heavy track specialist of the field. Massive threat in these conditions.

selections.name: Amarone
selections.reason: Won well last start and gets the inside draw. Handles the wet and looks perfectly placed.

selections.name: Off The Scale
selections.reason: Last start winner but has to carry top weight on a heavy track. Still a major player.

selections.name: Ken'ker
selections.reason: Consistent form and has a win and a place on heavy going. Wide draw is the only negative.

selections.name: Talana
selections.reason: Won two starts back and has placed on heavy. Weight penalty applies but has class.

danger_horse.name: Off The Scale
danger_horse.reason: Class runner of the field. If she handles the weight in the mud, she can win again.

selections.name: Royal Teens (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent heavy track record (10:1-1-1). Good draw and solid recent form.

selections.name: Wilderness Star
selections.reason: Very experienced on heavy ground with multiple wins. Consistent and well drawn.

selections.name: Coco Dreaming
selections.reason: Won last start but faces a wide draw and weight penalty on the heavy track.

selections.name: Whiskers
selections.reason: Won two starts back. Good draw and can bounce back from a poor last run.

danger_horse.name: Wilderness Star
danger_horse.reason: A true mudlark who will relish the Heavy 8 conditions.

selections.name: Where's The Fire
selections.reason: Won last start and has a win on heavy ground. Perfect inside draw for this tight track.

selections.name: Ensign Parker
selections.reason: Consistent form and gets barrier 1. Weight penalty is a slight concern but has class.

selections.name: Craig's One
selections.reason: Solid recent form. Needs to prove himself on heavy but has the ability.

selections.name: Picasso's Dream
selections.reason: Has a win and two placings on heavy tracks. Capable of featuring in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Ensign Parker
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to dictate terms. If he handles the weight, he will be hard to catch.
